title: Dark Mode Voice Chat
description:
Voice Chat Dark Mode
BUT THE GUI IS ALSO DARK
body:
So about a year ago I was looking through the files for some mod assets and found something that really annoyed me.
The dark mode for [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) wasn't actualy fully dark mode beacuse none of the Gui's where actualy dark mode all of them where light mode still, so I set out to fix that by retexturing all of the Gui's and never posting it, this was mostly beacuse I only wanted it for my own personal pack, now one year later I have come to my senses and decided to post it and this is the finished product.

The one on the left is Mine and The one on the right is the default dark mode included with the mod
![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07bfe54979f801a450fdaf4986fbcf0e74c8a66d.png)
